description: A patient calls a support program to activate a co-pay card to help with the cost of their prescription.

nodes.task_description: Identify the patient in the support program database using their name and date of birth.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully locates the patient's profile.

nodes.task_description: Verify the patient's eligibility for the co-pay assistance program.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent confirms the patient has commercial insurance and meets the eligibility criteria.

nodes.task_description: Activate the patient's co-pay card in the system.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully activates the card and provides the patient with the necessary processing information for the pharmacy.
